name: inactive_customers_90_days
description: Identify customers who have not made any transactions in the last 90 days for customer care campaigns.

steps.name: LOAD_CUSTOMER
steps.description: Load customer data with selected columns, excluding null customer IDs.

steps.name: LOAD_TRANSACTION
steps.sql:
SELECT customer_id, transaction_date
FROM ${TRANSACTION_TABLE}
WHERE customer_id IS NOT NULL
  AND transaction_date IS NOT NULL
steps.description: Load transaction data with required columns, filtering out null customer IDs and dates.

steps.name: FILTER_RECENT_TRANSACTIONS
steps.sql:
SELECT customer_id
FROM LOAD_TRANSACTION
WHERE transaction_date >= CAST($[REFERENCE_DATE] AS DATE) - INTERVAL 90 DAYS
steps.description: Filter transactions that occurred within the last 90 days from the reference date. Only customer IDs are retained for the subsequent anti-join.

steps.name: JOIN_INACTIVE_CUSTOMERS
steps.sql:
SELECT c.customer_id, c.customer_name, c.customer_email, c.customer_phone
FROM LOAD_CUSTOMER c
LEFT ANTI JOIN FILTER_RECENT_TRANSACTIONS t
ON c.customer_id = t.customer_id
steps.description: Identify customers who have no transactions in the last 90 days using a left anti-join.

steps.name: SAVE_INACTIVE_CUSTOMERS
steps.sql:
SELECT customer_id, customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone
FROM JOIN_INACTIVE_CUSTOMERS
steps.description: Persist the list of inactive customers to the output HDFS table.
